name: sqlbackend-executor-integration
description: SqlBackend.compileSelect/compileCount/compileExists return [sql, params, joins] tuple. BunSqlExecutor consumes the first two elements. Integration pattern: (1) SqlBackend remains stateless compiler, (2) BunSqlExecutor handles connection and execution, (3) CollectionQueryable terminal operations call SqlBackend.compile*() then BunSqlExecutor.execute(). This maintains separation of concerns.
recommendation: SqlBackend stays unchanged. BunSqlExecutor wraps the [sql, params] tuple from SqlBackend and executes against Bun.sql connection. Define clear interface boundary.
